title: Crop Cultivation
description: "Crop Cultivation" is a course study the growth and development of crops, the formation of yield and quality and their relationship with environmental conditions. On this basis, appropriate cultivation and management are utilized for achieving the aims of high yield, stable yield, high quality and high efficiency, ecologically friendly, and food security.  "Crop Cultivation" is a comprehensive discipline of agricultural production. Any new research results, new varieties, and new technologies in the field of agronomy must pass its inspection, evaluation and integration to show its efficacy and value in agricultural production. Therefore, it is one of the critical signs that reflect the levels of agricultural technology and production in a country or a region.
